edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:645b04bd89f2
edges.original_sentence: Placing materials in loose hills and providing heterogeneity in substrates more than doubled plant abundance, species richness, and increased the proportion of species that require higher soil moisture.

source_spans.text: Placing materials in loose hills and providing heterogeneity in substrates more than doubled plant abundance, species richness, and increased the proportion of species that require higher soil moisture.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:740e910a7c16
edges.original_sentence: Lower micro-elevations and northern microaspects of the microtopographic treatments had up to three times higher soil water content and double the species richness.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:645b04bd89f2
edges.original_sentence: The control treatment had the highest average bulk density, followed by the ridged treatment and the hilled treatment with 1.45 ±0.02, 1.34 ±0.02, and 1.03±0.02g/cm3, respectively.

source_spans.text: The control treatment had the highest average bulk density, followed by the ridged treatment and the hilled treatment with 1.45 ±0.02, 1.34 ±0.02, and 1.03±0.02g/cm3, respectively.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:71e14588c56c
edges.original_sentence: The higher soil water content observed in the hilled treatment was likely the result of higher infiltration capacity of the loosely placed soil resulting in reduced run-off
